contains read-only view functions, which are standard for such interfaces.\n- No suspicious code patterns, obfuscation, hardcoded secrets, or backdoors are identified.\n- The code sources data solely from static ABI definitions and the ethers.js library, with no external data flows or dynamic code execution.\n\n**Specific points:**\n- The malware score is consistently 0 across all reports, indicating no malicious behavior is detected.\n- The security risk score is very low (mostly 0, with one report at 0.1), aligning with the benign nature of the code.\n- All reports confidently state that the code is safe, standard, and autogenerated.\n\n**Critical assessment:**\n- The reports are thorough and consistent, correctly identifying that this is a standard, non-malicious, autogenerated interface factory.\n- There are no claims or assumptions about vulnerabilities that are unsubstantiated.\n- The scores assigned (malware: 0, risk: near zero) are reasonable and justified based on the
